verdict.answer_first: A states the likely cause immediately: "Most likely: your access tokens have a short expiry... and the refresh path isn't actually working"; B starts by framing "one of two distinct failure shapes."
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder with "Most likely" and "A close second"; B surveys: "almost always one of two distinct failure shapes."
verdict.actionability: B is slightly easier to act on right now because its "Fastest checks" include logging the exact JWT verification error reason: "TokenExpiredError vs JsonWebTokenError/invalid signature."
